<?php /* * This file is part of the Symfony package. * * (c) Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Symfony\Component\VarDumper\Caster; use Symfony\Component\VarDumper\Cloner\Stub; /** * @author Nicolas Grekas <p@tchwork.com> * * @internal */ final class GdCaster { public static function castGd(\GdImage $gd, array $a, Stub $stub, bool $isNested): array { $a[Caster::PREFIX_VIRTUAL.'size'] = imagesx($gd).'x'.imagesy($gd); $a[Caster::PREFIX_VIRTUAL.'trueColor'] = imageistruecolor($gd); return $a; } }
